zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Pridias於1236年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Roger de Prideaux I12歲，母親Gilda de Banco17歲。他於1259年與Jane de Bodrugan在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1280年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Pridias于1236年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Roger de Prideaux I12岁，母亲Gilda de Banco17岁。他于1259年与Jane de Bodrugan在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1280年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Pridias was born in 1236, in Cornwall, England, his father, Roger de Prideaux I, was 12 and his mother, Gilda de Banco, was 17. He married Jane de Bodrugan in 1259, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1280.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Pridias est né en 1236, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Prideaux I, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Gilda de Banco, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Bodrugan en 1259, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1280.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Pridias 1236 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Prideaux I 12 und seine Mutter Gilda de Banco 17. Er hat 1259 in Cornwall, England Jane de Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1280.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Pridias è nato il nel 1236 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Roger de Prideaux I, aveva 12 anni e il suo madre, Gilda de Banco, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Bodrugan nel 1259, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1280.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Pridiasが1236年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger de Prideaux Iは12歳，母Gilda de Bancoは17歳であった。1259年にイギリスコルンワルでJane de Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1280年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Pridias(이)가 1236년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Prideaux I(은)는 12세였고, 그의 어머니 Gilda de Banco(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1259년 영국 코른월에서 Jane de Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1280년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Pridias nasceu em 1236, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Prideaux I, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Gilda de Banco, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane de Bodrugan em 1259, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1280.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Pridias родился в 1236 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Prideaux I было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Gilda de Banco, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Bodrugan в 1259 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1280 г.

Se casó con Jane de Bodrugan en 1259, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1280.
